relationships.paper: TableLoRA: Low-rank Adaptation on Table Structure Understanding for Large Language Models
relationships.evidence: We select 8 human-preference benchmarks for evaluation of the chat capabilities and reports the average normalized score at the percentage scale. Additionally, due to the high cost of conducting subjective evaluations with a paid API model, we use GPT4o as the Judge Model for main results only, and we judge with the open-source CompassJudger-1-32B (Cao et al., 2024) in ablation study and scaling experiments. (Section 4.1)
